title: Awesome headphones!
text: Awesome headphones!! My son is autistic and hates certain noises. He uses these headphones ALL the time. I have been through over 50 pairs of headphones and ear muffs. He loves these and they are durable and work fantasticly. I highly recommend. It's a great product for the price.

title: Speaker blew on day one
text: I bought these headphones for my son to use at school. By the end of his first day using them, the speaker stopped working in one of the ears! I returned them and got my account credited, but it was a huge disappointment and forced my son to go without sound on his iPad for school while I ordered another pair from another company.

title: 3 pair all Broke in first month.
text: These headphones keep breaking. I ordered 3 pair for my kids in blue, pink, and green. They each broke within a month of use. I expected more but you get what you pay for.

title: For a kids headset you would think it would be more durable.
text:
I received these headphones on Aug 15, 2018. They ere purchased to be used at my son's school on headphone jack broke. It was required that each child would bring his/her own headphones for school purposes. So in essence he was the only one that used these headphones. But As of Oct 10th 2018 (2 months later), They have come back home with the metal part of the jack broken off. The note from the teacher explained that the jack itself was stuck inside of a laptop... I am just happy that they were able to remove the broken piece or the school may had been looking towards me in buying them a new laptop.

Since this was at a school.. the headphones would have not been in constant use. If it was regular home use? I strongly feel it would have broken alot sooner.

title: One Star
text: the size is too small and I dont like the sound.

title: Not good quality
text: This was a horrible choice. They barely connect to audio and when they do, it’s spotty at best. My daughter was using them for school computer class but she has had to borrow a pair every class for months which I just learned when we tried to use them at home for e learning. I would not recommend this!

title: Not durable, broke after 7 months
text: These were great while they worked. The cord is not durable at all. It's very long and became kinked and eventually broke exposing the wires inside. Now the headphones do not work at all. There is no sound. They lasted us about 7 months.

title: These are nice. They are soft and padded
text: These are nice.  They are soft and padded.  They fold nicely.  The color is great.  But they are not for kids.  They are way to big for both my kids and even too big on my head on the smallest setting.  I will keep them for a back up being they were so cheap, but they don't do us much good...

title: Didnt last long
text: returned within weeks...stopped working

title: Didn’t last very long.
text: Bought these for my daughter for vacation in Korea. After three weeks they started creating a static noise. Really disappointed.  We missed our window to return then while out of the country.

title: These headphones are awesome! Fit my 6 year old perfectly
text:
These headphones are awesome! Fit my 6 year old perfectly, but an adult would be able to use them as well.
Very cute colors.

title: Cheap quality
text: Only used a few times and they are already making some weird noise. Lots of static.

title: Great headphones
text: I purchased these for my 9-year-old daughter. She's not the most attentive person and often leaves things lying about, which means they often get dropped, stepped on, sat on, etc. These have held up well to over a month of such treatment. She's also very sensitive to things that feel uncomfortable and has no complaints about the padding on her ears; she loves them. (She has thick, curly hair which sometimes gets snagged on the metal upside down u-shape over the headphones, though.) They are very good at noise canceling, which she loves! (I don't always since she can't hear me calling her, ha ha.) Great, great headphones for the price. I recommend them and would buy again.

title: Soft and adjustable. The cord is flexible and doesn’t break
text: This is a second pair we bought. We have two kids and bought one for one of them, liked them so much ended up buying another one. I like that the cord is flexible because that is where most of the head sets become defective. They are soft and very adjustable.

title: Kids' headphones for school.
text: These headphones were perfect for my 7yo to take to school.

title: Work well, kids love it
text: I bought them for school for my kid. They work well and are easy to handle. So far they are lasting. I bought another one for my elder son after his headphones broke.

title: Broke within weeks of occasional use
text: Bought two pairs, both broke in under a month, and they weren't abused or treated roughly.

title: BUYERS: skip these.
text: Bought for our 7yo.  She barely uses them and already (barely 3 months later) there is no sound on the left.  Connections are loose somewhere under the padding as sound comes through in bursts when pressed.  We bought cheap because.... she's 7 and they would be rarely used.  But this wasn't even worth what we did spend.

title: No volume control
text: I hate that no volume bottom for adjustment is available

title: Lasted less than a month!
text: I have used these headphones twice. The first time they worked, the second they didn’t play sound properly. They have been stored on my dresser and have not been damaged, they just quit working.

title: Great quality headphone for the price!
text: I got these headphones as I have to take a five hour flight with my two boys (6 & 2, yikes!).  They haven't actually worn them out, but I tested them out in preparation.  Good quality sound and really comfortable.  I like the braiding over the wire as my oldest has a tendency to kink the wire as he has earplugs in.  So far, I am happy with my purchase.

title: Not sized for kids
text: These are NOT sized for children. They are titled “kids headphones” but are way too large to stay on a child’s head. The sound is ok and the cord is durable looking. But those are kinda pointless when my kids can’t get the ear pads to line up with their ears.

title: Pretty happy so far!
text: These seem like they will be amazing I am a big guy and can use them when my daughter isn't, but I do wish the ear covers where a little bit bigger, but overall great sound quality for the price you can't beat it! Good bass and the right amount of treb! If I could find some of these with bigger ear pieces I would order myself a pair! I don't know how long they will last only con maybe is durability, but still seem fairly solid either way and I like that they fold away.

title: Great headphones
text: These fit my 7 year old perfect, and are very comfortable. Nice quality as well.

title: Don’t buy
text: They don’t work and conveniently just outside the return window. Don’t waste your money

title: Love them
text: Cute and functional. Worked great for our toddler.

title: Great for kids
text: Awesome how they fold up. Good for our kids in the car or even at home. Cord is decent size

title: Five Stars
text: My nephew was very happy with his new headphones

title: Lasted a month then didn’t work anymore
text: These head phones seemed nice. Only lasted my son a month and now they don’t work.

title: Good fit for ears
text: Great for children and for their school

title: Great fit for kids
text: My Grand son loves these to use with his kindle. Cuts down on all the kindle games noise  I had to listen to  while we were in the same room.

title: My son likes them
text: I bought these for my child’s computer time at school. So far so good. He really likes them and we both like the color.

title: Great for little heads and good sound
text: My kids love them. Great size and sound. My 4 year old and 8 year old have a pair and they’re perfect.

title: Work great
text: Loved these, bought a pair for school for my son and a pair for home. Work great, very happy with

title: Kid approved
text:
She’s 2 1/2 and loves these. Solid construction and don’t go too loud. They were loud enough for her to watch movies on a flight

Update: we still have these and she’s still using them. Great purchase!

title: Great kids headphone
text: Perfect for the flight! My 3 yr old loved it!

title: First Airplane Ride
text: Good product, the grandkids enjoyed having these on the plane

title: compact
text: these are great, I love that they fold up small and compact and have a braided cord.

title: Great headphones!
text: Great headphones for my 8 year old daughter! They are really cute and fit her great and the sound is very good!

title: Quality headphones at a reasonable price.
text: I love the soft  pink color.  The headphones are very good and very reasonable.

title: Great Quality For Kids(and adults) and for Price!
text: Love these headphones! She is not easy on anything and these have already lasted longer than the 2-3 weeks than the $20 pair that we bought at Walmart! I'm thinking of getting a pair for myself! Just a warning though they are pretty good at canceling out sound. So don't get mad at your kid of they don't answer when you call for them.

title: Fit a five-year-old head
text: My five-year-old has enjoyed these headphones and I'm thankful they'll grow a bit with him in time.

title: That is my jam!!!
text: Bought these for my daughter. She loves them. As a parent what I like is the volume control. It allows her to listen to her music and videos at a good level to not hurt her ears. I Also love the cord. It seems very durable and should help in preventing the wires from fraying. And of course you can't go wrong with pink for a princess.

title: Great deal and perfect kids / road trips
text: Great price for kids headphones! It lasted a week long trip with kids throwing them around like lassos. Worked for my 3 yr old and up to my 7 yr old. I haven't personally listened but good enough for kids. Like the folding feature and one ear cord design.

title: Great product.
text: The sound quality is great. Love the color.

title: Five Stars
text:
Great sound. My son loves these.
Excellent customer service!

title: Kid approved!!
text: The grandkids love these, we purchased 2

title: Would buy again!
text: Perfect for my (9 y/o) son for in-school use. Works well for noise cancellation, safe, fun. He loves them.

title: Not technically kid sized, but works well
text: Not really kid sized, they're the same size as my headphones, but they work well and I love the braided cord!

title: Great for kids
text: Perfect for the kid- seems durable.

title: cheap
text: get what you pay for with these.  Bought these for my 10 yr old boys-  they do the job, sound quality isnt great and they are a little flimsy, but they do work for their intended purpose.

title: Worth it
text: My son loves these. Getting some for my daughter now. Totally worth it.

title: Great headphones !
text: Great headphones, perfect for my grandson!

title: You need this in your school supply haul.
text: Great to send to your child's class. These are durable and great quality.

title: My Daughter Loves These Headphones
text: I bought these headphones for my 9 year old daughter so that she can watch her school virtual learning videos or youtube videos with more privacy for both me and for her. She loves the colors and says that they work great. She likes that they're adjustable.

title: Kid friendly
text: The kids like the color, it is unisex so all students want to use them. They fold up for portability and easy stowage.

title: Great for kids
text: These are great for kids who are first timers with headphones. Pretty durable and not too ugly.

title: Great design
text: Great design and kid loves them

title: Stopped Working
text: Bought these for my daughter to use at school. Stopped working after just a few weeks.

title: breaks with a 2 foot drop
text: It is not tangle free hurts the ears and plug breaks easy

title: Five Stars
text: Great for my sanity on the airplane!!

title: Great value, great quality!
text: Impressed at the packaging and the quality of the headphones themselves. My son unfortunately did break his pair of dark blue ones but only cause he pulled the cord too roughly.

title: Yes!
text: Peace at last. Bought for grand kids to use with kindle fires.

title: Great quality and value
text: These work great. I bought them for my son, but I have used them too. They are not volume limiting. I was looking for kids headphones that were not volume limited, because volume limited ones don’t work on a plane. These are comfortable for both my four year old and me.  These would also be great for a computer lab or to use with chrome books or iPads at school. They are an excellent value.

title: These are awesome.
text: There is no volume control, so be sure your kid knows to put the volume on a appropriate level using the device. I was pleased with the sound quality too lol. They look and feel like they'll hold up well.

title: Five Stars
text: These feel and sound like high quality headphones. They also fold up nicely.

title: Best for Amazon Fire
text: These are great for the Amazon Fire and keep the children happy.

title: As expected... Nice
text: My 7 year old likes how comfortable they are (when we make her wear them to listen to her tablet.). Color is nice. Seem cushy. We haven't had any problems with them.

title: My daughter loves this
text: My twin girls love these  I purchased two this one is great the other one the ear piece is messed up and can’t use it very disappointed in that

title: Cute
text: Great just a little big for my little one

title: Very kid friendly
text: Fit the kids heads ages 6 and 10 perfectly they used them for a 14hr drive with minimal complaints. It’s a plus only having one cord from one side, less tangles.

title: Fairly durable
text: My daughter wears her headphones all the time and sleeps with them on, these are the only kind that she doesn't destroy in a day. I've bought 3 pairs of these over the years and we love them.

title: Awesome buy
text: Fits my 4 year old great and worked for what we needed. Affordable as well. We have had for almost a year.

title: Seem durable
text: So far they are holding up under my daughter's heavy use.

title: Finally a lasting set for my grand daughter.
text: Worked out great for my grand daughter she loves these.
